title: FabHotels International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: FabHotels International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the FabHotels International Enterprises family as a E-commerce Executive in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FabHotels International Enterprises:
FabHotels International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels International Enterprises!
